name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to interpret and work with numerical data and statistics. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis and financial decision making.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to understand and evaluate written information and draw logical conclusions. Ideal for roles requiring strong communication.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and relationships in abstract information. Great for problem solving and analytical roles.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses logical thinking and ability to draw conclusions from given information. Suitable for analytical and technical roles.

name: Verify - Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical and physical concepts. Ideal for engineering and technical roles.

name: OPQ - Occupational Personality Questionnaire
description: Comprehensive personality assessment measuring 32 dimensions of workplace behavior and preferred working style.

name: MQ - Motivation Questionnaire
description: Assesses what motivates and energizes an individual at work. Helps predict engagement and job satisfaction.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: Tests ability to perform numerical calculations accurately and efficiently. Ideal for accounting and finance roles.

name: Verify - Checking
description: Measures accuracy and attention to detail when checking information. Suitable for data entry and administrative roles.

name: Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios and measures judgement in handling them. Ideal for customer service and managerial roles.

name: Work Safety Assessment
description: Measures attitudes and behaviors related to workplace safety. Ideal for operational and industrial roles.

name: Customer Contact Styles
description: Assesses interpersonal style and suitability for customer facing roles. Measures empathy and communication approach.

name: Sales Achievement Predictor
description: Predicts sales performance by measuring drive competitiveness and persuasion skills. Ideal for sales roles.

name: Technology Professional Scenarios
description: Situational judgement test designed for IT and software development professionals. Measures technical decision making.

name: Graduate 8
description: Comprehensive graduate assessment measuring verbal numerical and inductive reasoning. Ideal for graduate recruitment.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument
description: Measures reliability conscientiousness and safety orientation. Ideal for roles where dependability is critical.

name: Verify - Reading Comprehension
description: Assesses ability to read and understand written passages quickly and accurately. Suitable for administrative roles.

name: Call Center Simulation
description: Realistic job simulation for call center roles. Measures multitasking customer handling and problem resolution.

name: Administrative Professional Scenarios
description: Situational judgement for administrative professionals. Measures organization prioritization and communication.

name: Bank Administrative Simulation
description: Job simulation for banking administrative roles. Measures accuracy compliance and customer interaction.
